text:
Al, Captured is the 33rd episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

The Elric boys are separated when kidnappers take Al to their hideout, leaving Ed frantic to find his brother. Izumi steps in to help her protégés as always, and finds they've learned something from life she could never have taught them alone... Responsibility.

Trivia and See Also

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 26: To Meet the Master, Chapter 27: The Beasts of Dublith and Chapter 28: A Fool's Courage
Episode 13: Beasts of Dublith (2009 series)
Episode 14: Those Who Lurk Underground (2009 series)
